Name: PV Inverter Input Voltage

Items.StringList: Average of subarray voltages|Estimate subarray mismatch loss (long simulation run time)

Caption.String: Inverter Input Voltage for Multiple Subarrays

For a system with a single MPPT and more than one subarray, choose how to calculate the inverter input voltage. The average option is best for most applications. The voltage mismatch loss option requires long simulation run times.
The nominal DC voltage of each subarray is determined by the number of modules per string above. Use the options below to specify how SAM determines the inverter input voltage(s).
For a system with one inverter, to model an inverter input voltage for each subarray, set the number of MPPTs equal to the number of subarrays and assign an MPPT number to each subarray.
The inverter clips the subarray voltage to the minimum and maximum inverter voltage ratings so that the subarray voltage is never less than Vmppt_low or greater than Vmppt_high.

Callbacks: // resets max DC, max MPPT, min MPPT voltages to values from inverter page should run from inverter page when values change there
msg += 'Minimum MPPT voltage is different from value on inverter page: ' + inv_vlow + ' Vdc.\n';
msg += 'Maximum MPPT voltage is different from value on inverter page: ' + inv_vhi + ' Vdc.\n';
msg += 'Maximum DC voltage is different from value on inverter page: ' + inv_vmax + ' Vdc.';
msg = 'Change the voltage ratings here to use different values than the values on the Inverter page.';
msg = 'Multiple MPPT is only supported for systems with one inverter.';
msg = 'Number of MPPTs must be between 1 and ' + to_string(n_subarrays_max) +'.';
msg = 'The number of enabled subarrays must be the same as the number of MPPTs.';
en = true; // subarray 1 is always enabled
msg = 'MPPT number ' + value(var) + ' is assigned to more than one subarray.';
msg = 'MPPT number must be between 1 and the number of MPPTs.';
if ( vhi > vmax ) { msg = 'Inverter maximum MPPT voltage is greater than inverter maximum DC voltage.';}
if ( vhi < vlow ) { msg = 'Inverter maximum MPPT voltage is less than inverter minimum MPPT voltage.';}
if ( vlow > vhi ) { msg = 'Inverter minimum MPPT voltage is greater than inverter maximum MPPT voltage.';}
msg = 'Estimate subarray mismatch is not available for multiple MPPTs.';
// this also needs to be called from the PV Subarrays and String Size form
// show mppt inputs for enabled subarrays
// if one inverter enable/disable mppt inputs
en = value('inv_num_mppt') > 1;  // only enable mppt inputs if number of MPPTs is greater than 1
